{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Underlord advancement
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Underlord advancement]] is caused by an understanding of what started a person on their [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
